overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a student character in dark robes exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks through stone corridors, descends spiral staircases, and passes through rooms lit by warm wall-mounted lanterns, encountering other student NPCs along the way.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic castle interior that transitions from open stone galleries into intimate, wood-paneled rooms and narrow stairwells. It begins in a stone chamber featuring a prominent statue, moving through a curved corridor with gothic windows and along an ornate balcony before descending a curved ramp. As the character continues downward and passes another student, the scene shifts through an arched doorway into a wood-paneled room filled with covered furniture. The camera then follows the character as they leave the room and enter a tight spiral staircase, passing framed portraits under the warm glow of wall-mounted lanterns. Finally, the movement concludes with a descent down the stone stairs behind ornate iron railings.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a cozy, enclosed antechamber into the expansive, ornate halls of a gothic castle. It begins as the character exits a spiral staircase into a small room featuring green patterned wallpaper and wooden benches, before passing through an arched doorway. The scene then opens into a grand stone corridor where the camera glides past towering pillars and warm wall sconces, moving through a crowd of fellow students toward a distant archway. Finally, the environment shifts into a curved portrait gallery, where the camera follows the character along ornate railings past walls lined with framed paintings and gathering groups of students.
